mapper.select: SELECT ID, EDU_VIDEO_TITLE, EDU_VIDEO_DETAIL, EDU_VIDEO_TYPE, EDU_VIDEO_URL, EDU_VIDEO_THUMBNAIL_URL, EDU_VIDEO_CREATE_AT FROM ( SELECT ID, EDU_VIDEO_TITLE, EDU_VIDEO_DETAIL, EDU_VIDEO_TYPE, EDU_VIDEO_URL, EDU_VIDEO_THUMBNAIL_URL, EDU_VIDEO_CREATE_AT FROM TBL_EDU_VIDEO WHERE EDU_VIDEO_TYPE = 'fairy_tale' ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE() ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_EDU_VIDEO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_EDU_VIDEO(ID, EDU_VIDEO_TITLE, EDU_VIDEO_DETAIL, EDU_VIDEO_TYPE, EDU_VIDEO_URL, EDU_VIDEO_THUMBNAIL_URL) VALUES(#{id}, #{eduVideoTitle}, #{eduVideoDetail}, #{eduVideoType}, #{eduVideoUrl}, #{eduVideoThumbnailUrl})
